response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and AWS — aligning with core requirements — but his resume overstates seniority (Staff/Senior roles since 2014) inconsistent with an entry-level role, and he lacks clear evidence of PostgreSQL, Nest.js, or renewable energy domain exposure; his heavy focus on DLang and niche projects may indicate misalignment with the platform’s tech stack priorities.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and React experience across multiple production systems
Proven fullstack ownership from frontend to infrastructure (Docker, CI/CD, AWS)
Demonstrated passion for clean architecture and knowledge sharing via workshops
concerns: Claims Staff/Senior roles since 2014 — likely overqualified for entry-level position
No explicit mention of PostgreSQL, Nest.js, or renewable energy domain experience
German language proficiency is basic, but role requires high on-site presence in Berlin
